meaning: n.枪手,持枪的歹徒,制造枪械者
examples: They were taken captive by masked gunmen.
Gunmen intercepted him on his way to the airport.
Gunmen guarded homes near the cemetery with shotguns.
Iraq's prime minister has given gunmen in Basra three days to hand over their weapons.
Their first thought was that it was the Army, but the gunmen were masked.
